payload.answer: Duplicate Slack event detected from context; do not write any new memory cards for this retry.

entity_resolution.reason: The prompt states the same Slack event ID was delivered twice, so this delivery should not create or repeat durable memory.

details: Recognized this intake as a retry of an already-delivered Slack event.
Suppressed additional durable writes to avoid duplicate memory.

repair_options: Use the Slack event ID as an idempotency key and ignore repeated deliveries.
If the original delivery was not persisted, process exactly once and mark the event ID as consumed.

raw_text: {"intent":"slack_event_retry_deduplication","decision":"no_op_duplicate_event","memory_cards":[],"entity_resolution":{"action":"none","entity_id":null,"reason":"The prompt states the same Slack event ID was delivered twice, so this delivery should not create or repeat durable memory."},"conflict_classification":"duplicate_event_retry","answer":"Duplicate Slack event detected from context; do not write any new memory cards for this retry.","citations":["\"Same Slack event ID delivered twice\"","\"Sam from Goldman likes Bill Evans.\""],"repair_options":["Use the Slack event ID as an idempotency key and ignore repeated deliveries.","If the original delivery was not persisted, process exactly once and mark the event ID as consumed."],"receipt":{"success":true,"details":["Recognized this intake as a retry of an already-delivered Slack event.","Suppressed additional durable writes to avoid duplicate memory."]}}
